agent_trace.summary: 验证 ICS 文件内容符合 grading criteria
agent_trace.raw_tail:
nesday)
# Next Tuesday: 2026-03-31
current_date = datetime(2026, 3, 25)
days_until_tuesday = (2 - current_date.weekday() + 7) % 7  # 2 = Tuesday
if days_until_tuesday == 0:
    days_until_tuesday = 7
next_tuesday = current_date + timedelta(days=days_until_tuesday)

# Create ICS content
ics_content = f"""BEGIN:VCALENDAR
VERSION:2.0
PRODID:-//PinchBench//Calendar Event//EN
BEGIN:VEVENT
UID:project-sync-{next_tuesday.strftime('%Y%m%d')}@pinchbench
DTSTAMP:{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%dT%H%M%S')}
DTSTART:{next_tuesday.strftime('%Y%m%d')}T150000
DTEND:{next_tuesday.strftime('%Y%m%d')}T160000
SUMMARY:Project Sync
DESCRIPTION:Discussing the Q1 roadmap
ATTENDEE:mailto:john@example.com
END:VEVENT
END:VCALENDAR
"""

# Write to workspace
workspace = "/home/feic/pjs/SocialSystemArena/traces/benchmarks/minimax_m2.5/pinchbench/edo_bakuhan/20260325T115112Z/workspaces/task_01_calendar/run_01"
pathlib.Path(workspace).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
pathlib.Path(f"{workspace}/project_sync.ics").write_text(ics_content)
print(f"Created: {workspace}/project_sync.ics")
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**

{
  "type": "python",
  "timeout": 30,
  "cwd": "/home/feic/pjs/SocialSystemArena/traces/benchmarks/minimax_m2.5/pinchbench/edo_bakuhan/20260325T115112Z/workspaces/task_01_calendar/run_01"
}
````
